Query
  Pipeline
    Stage where
      Between
        Ident duration_ms
        Int 20
        Int 6000
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
        Agg
          Call avg
            Ident duration_ms
          Alias avg_dur
        Agg
          Call min
            Ident duration_ms
          Alias min_dur
        Agg
          Call max
            Ident duration_ms
          Alias max_dur
